title: Stilton Tandoori Crisp
description: A tangy and crispy Polish dish featuring Stilton cheese, prepared in a tandoor to offer an energizing and raw-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: Stilton cheese
ingredients.notes: Use a young, mild Stilton for this recipe.

ingredients.name: Garlic cloves
ingredients.notes: Mince finely or use one minced garlic per person if cooking for more people.

ingredients.name: Red pepper flakes (optional)
ingredients.notes: For a tangier flavor profile, use less or omit.

instructions: Preheat the tandoor or oven to 250°C (475°F).
Gently press garlic cloves into a mix of olive oil and Stilton cheese, creating an aromatic paste. Spread this mixture evenly across a baking sheet.
Add lemon juice, curry powder, cumin seeds, and red pepper flakes if using, mixing well until the cheese is fully coated.
Place the prepared Stilton on the tandoor or in an oven-safe dish, ensuring all sides are exposed to heat for a crisp effect. Bake for 15-20 minutes until golden brown and crispy.
Serve immediately as a snack with your choice of raw vegetables or fruit slices.
